title: Validate account metadata
description: Validation-only task intentionally has no Implements link: it resolves OQ-LEDGER-4 from owner-supplied redacted evidence before account persistence and commands implementation.
objective: Confirm all three products are supported deposit accounts with sufficient masked identity.

interfaces.name: OQ-LEDGER-4Resolution
notes: Produced only when the open question resolves; invalidation leaves the task blocked

text: Given redacted samples covering all three accounts and both banks, the evidence matrix records product types, safe metadata, and uniqueness without descriptions, full identifiers, credentials, or raw rows.
Given consistent evidence, OQ-LEDGER-4 is resolved with a decision naming coverage and the exact confirmed rule.

Given invalidating or incomplete evidence, write the contradiction or unavailable-evidence reason to the redacted report, leave OQ-LEDGER-4 open, produce no OQ-LEDGER-4Resolution, keep this task non-complete, stop downstream execution, and hand off to /lex:design.
Owner samples remain outside the repository; only redacted structural conclusions are committed.
OQ-LEDGER-4 resolved with a non-empty decision on the only completing path
Do NOT store raw statements, full account numbers, credentials, descriptions, or identifying rows in docs/validation/ledger/oq-4-account-metadata.md.
Do NOT silently change DD-LEDGER-IMMUTABLE-HISTORY; invalidation returns to /lex:design.
Do NOT resolve OQ-LEDGER-4 from fewer than all three accounts and both banks.
Contradictory, incomplete, or unavailable evidence is a non-completing blocked outcome; do NOT mark this task complete or unblock any consumer of OQ-LEDGER-4Resolution.
Owner evidence remains external and must never be fabricated.
Required verification intentionally accepts only the completing resolved path; a blocker report leaves this task and its downstream frontier blocked.

references.target_title: Immutable financial facts with append-only lifecycle history
Confirm that the three initial accounts are deposit accounts and that bank name, owner label, account type, currency, and masked distinguishing identifier are sufficient.

description: Owner confirms the redacted matrix represents all accounts and banks.
Diff contains no raw financial data or unmasked identifiers.

verification_steps.command: test -s docs/validation/ledger/oq-4-account-metadata.md && lex open-question show OQ-LEDGER-4 --json | jq -e '.status == "resolved" and (.decision | length > 0)'
verification_steps.expected_result: exit 0; report is non-empty and OQ-LEDGER-4 has a non-empty resolved decision
